mapper.select: select orderid, status, forceokflag, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, arccnt, arctime, to_char(arcstart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcstart, to_char(arcend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcend, execnt, exetime, to_char(exestart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exestart, to_char(exeend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exeend, sqlmsg from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq, seq1 desc, seq2 desc, seq3 desc

select orderid, status, forceokflag, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, null as wherestr, null as sqlstr, arccnt, arctime, to_char(arcstart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcstart, to_char(arcend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcend, execnt, exetime, to_char(exestart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exestart, to_char(exeend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exeend, sqlmsg from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable where orderid= #{orderid} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq, seq1 desc, seq2 desc, seq3 desc

select orderid, status, forceokflag, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, null as wherestr, null as sqlstr, arccnt, arctime, to_char(arcstart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcstart, to_char(arcend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcend, execnt, exetime, to_char(exestart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exestart, to_char(exeend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exeend, sqlmsg from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable where orderid= #{orderid} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq, seq1 , seq2 , seq3

select orderid, status, forceokflag, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, arccnt, arctime, to_char(arcstart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcstart, to_char(arcend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcend, execnt, exetime, to_char(exestart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exestart, to_char(exeend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exeend, sqlmsg from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable where orderid= #{orderid} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq, seq1, seq2, seq3

select orderid, status, forceokflag, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, arccnt, arctime, to_char(arcstart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcstart, to_char(arcend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as arcend, execnt, exetime, to_char(exestart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exestart, to_char(exeend,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exeend, sqlmsg from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable where orderid= #{orderid} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and status not in ('Ended OK', 'Running') and forceokflag = 'N' order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq, seq1 desc, seq2 desc, seq3 desc

select d.* from ( select ROWNUM as rn, c.* from ( select a.system, b.jobid, b.db, b.owner, b.table_name, b.seq1, b.seq2, b.seq3 , sum(CASE WHEN b.steptype='EXE_ARCHIVE' THEN b.execnt ELSE 0 END) as arccnt , sum(CASE WHEN b.steptype='EXE_DELETE' THEN b.execnt ELSE 0 END) as delcnt from cotdl.tbl_piiorder a, cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable b where a.orderid = b.orderid and b.steptype in ('EXE_ARCHIVE', 'EXE_DELETE')
group by b.db, b.owner, b.table_name, a.system, b.jobid, b.seq1, b.seq2, b.seq3 order by b.db, b.owner, b.table_name, a.system, b.jobid ) c ) d where rn <= #{pagenum} * #{amount} and rn > (#{pagenum} -1) * #{amount} order by db, owner, table_name, jobid

select count(1) from ( select a.system, b.jobid, b.db, b.owner, b.table_name, b.seq1, b.seq2, b.seq3 , sum(CASE WHEN b.steptype='EXE_ARCHIVE' THEN b.execnt ELSE 0 END) as arccnt , sum(CASE WHEN b.steptype='EXE_DELETE' THEN b.execnt ELSE 0 END) as delcnt from cotdl.tbl_piiorder a, cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable b where a.orderid = b.orderid and b.steptype in ('EXE_ARCHIVE', 'EXE_DELETE')
group by b.db, b.owner, b.table_name, a.system, b.jobid, b.seq1, b.seq2, b.seq3 ) c
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable (orderid, status, forceokflag, basedate, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, arccnt, arctime, arcstart, arcend, execnt, exetime, exestart, exeend, sqlmsg) values (#{orderid}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepseq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{sqlstr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{arccnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arctime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{arcstart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), to_date(#{arcend, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), #{execnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{exestart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), to_date(#{exeend, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), #{sqlmsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable (orderid, status, forceokflag, basedate, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, arccnt, arctime, arcstart, arcend, execnt, exetime, exestart, exeend, sqlmsg) values (#{orderid}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepseq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{sqlstr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{arccnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arctime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{arcstart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), to_date(#{arcend, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), #{execnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{exestart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), to_date(#{exeend, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), #{sqlmsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable set status= 'Running', exestart= SYSDATE, exetime= null where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}

update cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable set status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_name= #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_col= #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_key_name= #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parallelcnt= #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, commitcnt= #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wherestr= #{wherestr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqlstr= #{sqlstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where orderid= #{orderid} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}

update cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable set status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, forceokflag= #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, arccnt= #{arccnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, arctime= #{arctime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, arcstart= to_date(#{arcstart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), arcend= to_date(#{arcend, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), execnt= #{execnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exetime= #{exetime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exestart= to_date(#{exestart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss'), exeend= to_date(#{exeend, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}

update cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable set status='Wait condition', forceokflag= null,
arctime= null, arcstart= null, arcend= null,
exetime= null, exestart= null, exeend= null where orderid= #{orderid} and status not in ('Ended OK', 'Wait condition')
